title: Is Wanted by the Law
summary: “WANTED, DEAD OR ALIVE” posters (or their equivalent) have appeared featuring your face. It’s up to you whether it’s a mistake that snowballed out of control or you actually would kill someone just for looking at you.
tiers: Tier 3: Outlaw Reputation or Successive Attack
Tier 6: Not Dead Yet or Lethal Damage
gm_intrusions: Most people do not take well to discovering a wanted outlaw in their midst.
